product: MySQL integrated CDC pipeline is now in Beta
tagline: The integrated CDC pipeline for MySQL is now in Beta.
what_it_does: The integrated CDC pipeline for MySQL is now in Beta. An integrated CDC pipeline ingests change data from MySQL into Databricks using a single pipeline, combining extraction and application into one pipeline update. Unlike the standard gateway based architecture, an integrated CDC pipeline requires no separate ingestion gateway.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: CREATE CONNECTION on the metastore
capabilities.desc: CREATE CONNECTION on the metastore (if creating a new Unity Catalog connection), or USE CONNECTION on an existing connection.

capabilities.desc: USE CATALOG on the destination catalog.

capabilities.desc: USE SCHEMA and CREATE TABLE on the destination schema.
